sections.title: Sales Management
sections.description: Create sales, view transactions, and generate invoices

items.title: Create a Sale
items.description: Record a new sale transaction with customer and products

steps.title: Go to Home Screen
steps.description: Open the app and navigate to the Home tab

steps.title: Tap Create Sale
steps.description: Tap the 'Create Sale' button or card on the home screen

steps.title: Select Customer
steps.description: Choose an existing customer from the list or add a new customer by entering name and phone

steps.title: Add Products
steps.description: Tap 'Add Product' to select products from your inventory or add custom products with name and price

steps.title: Set Due Date (Optional)
steps.description: If customer will pay later, set a due date for the payment

steps.title: Create Sale
steps.description: Review all details and tap 'Create Sale' button to save the transaction

tips: You can add multiple products in one sale
If customer is not in list, you can add them on the spot
Custom products can be added without creating them in inventory first
Due date helps track pending payments

items.title: View All Sales
items.description: See all your sales transactions in one place

steps.title: Go to Payments Tab
steps.description: Tap on the Payments tab in the bottom navigation

steps.title: View Sales List
steps.description: You will see all your sales transactions listed with customer name, amount, and date

steps.title: Search Sales
steps.description: Use the search bar to find sales by customer name or date

steps.title: View Sale Details
steps.description: Tap on any sale to see full details including products, amounts, and payment status

steps.title: Filter by Status
steps.description: Filter sales by payment status - pending, paid, or all

tips: Sales are automatically sorted by date (newest first)
You can see which sales are paid and which are pending
Use search to quickly find specific transactions

items.title: Generate Invoice
items.description: Create and share professional invoices for your sales

steps.title: Go to Payments Tab
steps.description: Navigate to the Payments tab from bottom navigation

steps.title: Select a Sale
steps.description: Find and tap on the sale for which you want to generate an invoice

steps.title: Tap Generate Invoice
steps.description: Look for the 'Generate Invoice' button or option in the sale details screen

steps.title: Review Invoice
steps.description: Check all details including customer info, products, amounts, and totals

steps.title: Share or Save
steps.description: Share the invoice via WhatsApp, email, or save as PDF

tips: Invoices include all sale details automatically
You can share invoices directly with customers
Invoices are professional and ready to print

items.title: Generate Receipt
items.description: Create payment receipts for your customers

steps.title: Go to Payments Tab
steps.description: Navigate to the Payments tab from bottom navigation

steps.title: Select a Payment
steps.description: Find and tap on the payment for which you want to generate a receipt

steps.title: Tap Generate Receipt
steps.description: Look for the 'Generate Receipt' button in the payment details

steps.title: Review Receipt
steps.description: Check payment details including customer, amount, date, and payment method

steps.title: Share Receipt
steps.description: Share the receipt via WhatsApp, email, or save as PDF for customer records

tips: Receipts are automatically generated with payment details
Customers can use receipts as proof of payment
You can share receipts instantly via messaging apps

sections.title: Customer Management
sections.description: Manage customers, track payments, and maintain relationships

items.title: View Customer Details
items.description: See complete information about any customer including sales, payments, and history

steps.title: Go to Customers Tab
steps.description: Tap on the Customers tab in the bottom navigation bar

steps.title: Find Customer
steps.description: Scroll through the list or use search to find the customer you want to view

steps.title: Tap Customer Card
steps.description: Tap on any customer card to open their detailed information screen

steps.title: View Customer Info
steps.description: See customer name, phone, village, total sales, total paid, and pending amount

steps.title: Check Sales History
steps.description: Scroll to see all sales transactions with this customer

steps.title: Check Payment History
steps.description: View all payments received from this customer with dates and amounts

tips: Customer details show complete transaction history
You can see pending amounts at a glance
All sales and payments are linked to customer records

items.title: Add New Customer
items.description: Add customers to your database for easy tracking

steps.title: Go to Customers Tab
steps.description: Navigate to the Customers tab from bottom navigation

steps.title: Tap Add Customer
steps.description: Look for the '+' or 'Add Customer' button, usually at the top or bottom of the screen

steps.title: Enter Customer Name
steps.description: Type the customer's full name in the name field

steps.title: Enter Phone Number
steps.description: Add customer's phone number (optional but recommended)

steps.title: Enter Village/Location
steps.description: Add customer's village or location address

steps.title: Save Customer
steps.description: Tap 'Save' or 'Add Customer' button to save the customer to your list

tips: Phone number helps in quick customer search
You can also add customers while creating a sale
Customer information can be updated later

items.title: Record Customer Payment
items.description: Record payments received from customers against their sales

steps.title: Go to Home Screen
steps.description: Navigate to the Home tab

steps.title: Tap Create Payment
steps.description: Tap on the 'Create Payment' button or card

steps.title: Select Customer
steps.description: Choose the customer who made the payment from the customer list

steps.title: Select Sale (If Multiple)
steps.description: If customer has multiple pending sales, select which sale this payment is for

steps.title: Enter Payment Amount
steps.description: Enter the amount received from the customer

steps.title: Select Payment Method
steps.description: Choose how customer paid - Cash or UPI

steps.title: Add Reference (Optional)
steps.description: If UPI payment, you can add payment screenshot or reference number

steps.title: Save Payment
steps.description: Tap 'Create Payment' to record the payment transaction

tips: Payments automatically update customer's pending amount
You can record partial payments
Payment history is saved for each customer

items.title: Call Customer
items.description: Call customers directly from the app without searching phone numbers

steps.title: Go to Customer Details
steps.description: Open any customer's detail screen from the customers list

steps.title: Find Call Button
steps.description: Look for the phone/call icon button on the customer details screen

steps.title: Tap to Call
steps.description: Tap the call button to dial the customer's phone number directly

steps.title: Call History
steps.description: Your phone's dialer will open and call logs are automatically saved

tips: No need to search for phone numbers manually
Call logs help track customer communication
Works with any phone number saved in customer profile

items.title: Set Customer Reminders
items.description: Set reminders for important customer-related tasks

steps.title: Go to Home Screen
steps.description: Navigate to the Home tab

steps.title: Tap Create Reminder
steps.description: Find and tap the 'Create Reminder' button or card

steps.title: Select Customer
steps.description: Choose the customer for whom you want to set a reminder

steps.title: Enter Reminder Title
steps.description: Type a title for your reminder (e.g., 'Collect payment from John')

steps.title: Set Date and Time
steps.description: Choose when you want to be reminded - select date and time

steps.title: Add Notes (Optional)
steps.description: Add any additional notes or details about the reminder

steps.title: Save Reminder
steps.description: Tap 'Save' or 'Create Reminder' to set the reminder

tips: Reminders help you never miss important tasks
You'll get a notification at the set time
Reminders are linked to customers for easy reference

items.title: Save Customer Location
items.description: Save customer addresses with GPS location for easy navigation

steps.title: Open Customer Details
steps.description: Go to any customer's detail screen from the customers list

steps.title: Find Location Option
steps.description: Look for location or address related option in customer details

steps.title: Tap Save Location
steps.description: Tap on 'Save Location' or 'Update Location' button

steps.title: Allow Location Permission
steps.description: Grant location permission when prompted by the app

steps.title: Select Location on Map
steps.description: Use the map to select customer's location or let GPS find current location

steps.title: Save Address
steps.description: Confirm and save the location. Address will be saved with GPS coordinates

tips: GPS location helps in navigation to customer places
You can update location anytime
Saved locations can be used for directions

items.title: Get Directions to Customers
items.description: Get navigation directions to one or multiple customer locations

steps.title: Go to Customers Tab
steps.description: Navigate to the Customers tab from bottom navigation

steps.title: Select Customers
steps.description: Select one or multiple customers whose locations you want to visit

steps.title: Tap Directions
steps.description: Look for 'Directions' or 'Navigate' button and tap it

steps.title: Choose Navigation App
steps.description: Select Google Maps or your preferred navigation app

steps.title: Follow Route
steps.description: Navigation app will open with the best route to visit all selected customers

tips: You can select multiple customers for one trip
Navigation shows the most efficient route
Saves time by planning customer visits

sections.title: Product Management
sections.description: Add products, manage inventory, and track stock

items.title: Add a Product
items.description: Add products to your inventory with name, price, and details

steps.title: Go to Products Screen
steps.description: Navigate to the Products tab or screen from the app

steps.title: Tap Add Product
steps.description: Tap the '+' or 'Add Product' button, usually at the top or bottom

steps.title: Enter Product Name
steps.description: Type the name of the product you want to add

steps.title: Enter Price
steps.description: Enter the selling price of the product

steps.title: Add Product Image (Optional)
steps.description: You can add a product photo by tapping the image area

steps.title: Add Description (Optional)
steps.description: Add any additional details about the product

steps.title: Save Product
steps.description: Tap 'Save' or 'Add Product' to add it to your inventory

tips: Product names should be clear and easy to find
Prices can be updated later if needed
Products are automatically available when creating sales

items.title: Manage Stock/Inventory
items.description: Track and update product stock levels

steps.title: Go to Products Screen
steps.description: Navigate to the Products or Inventory screen

steps.title: Select Product
steps.description: Tap on the product whose stock you want to update

steps.title: View Current Stock
steps.description: Check the current stock quantity displayed for the product

steps.title: Update Stock
steps.description: Tap 'Update Stock' or edit option to change the quantity

steps.title: Enter New Quantity
steps.description: Enter the updated stock quantity (add or subtract from current)

steps.title: Save Changes
steps.description: Tap 'Save' to update the stock level

tips: Stock updates help track available products
Low stock alerts can help prevent shortages
Stock is automatically updated when you make sales

items.title: View All Products
items.description: See all your products in one organized list

steps.title: Go to Products Screen
steps.description: Navigate to the Products section from the app

steps.title: Browse Products
steps.description: Scroll through your product list to see all items

steps.title: Search Products
steps.description: Use the search bar to quickly find specific products by name

steps.title: View Product Details
steps.description: Tap on any product to see full details including price and stock

steps.title: Edit or Delete
steps.description: From product details, you can edit information or delete products

tips: Products are listed with images and prices
Search makes it easy to find products quickly
You can organize products for better management

sections.title: Statistics & Reports
sections.description: Track your business performance and activities

items.title: View Business Statistics
items.description: See your business performance with sales, payments, and revenue data

steps.title: Go to Home Screen
steps.description: Navigate to the Home tab from bottom navigation

steps.title: View Dashboard
steps.description: On the home screen, you'll see dashboard cards showing key statistics

steps.title: Check Sales Summary
steps.description: See total sales, total revenue, and number of transactions

steps.title: View Payment Stats
steps.description: Check total payments received and pending amounts

steps.title: See Customer Count
steps.description: View total number of customers in your database

steps.title: Open Detailed Stats
steps.description: Tap on Statistics or Reports section to see detailed analytics

tips: Statistics update automatically with new transactions
Dashboard gives quick overview of business health
Detailed reports help in business planning

items.title: View Recent Activity
items.description: See all your recent sales, payments, and stock updates in one place

steps.title: Go to Home Screen
steps.description: Open the app and navigate to the home screen

steps.title: Scroll to Recent Activity
steps.description: Scroll down to find the 'Recent Activity' section below the dashboard

steps.title: View Activity Details
steps.description: Tap on any activity item to see more details like sale amount, customer name, and timestamp

steps.title: Refresh Activities
steps.description: Tap the refresh icon to get the latest activities from the server

steps.title: Start Your First Sale
steps.description: If you see 'Pending' state, tap 'Create Sale' button to start recording your first sale

tips: Recent activities show your last 10 transactions
Activities are automatically updated when you create sales or payments
You can see pending sales and completed payments in the activity list
If the list is empty, start by creating your first sale

items.title: View Business Insights
items.description: Get AI-powered insights and tips for your business

steps.title: Go to Home Screen
steps.description: Navigate to the Home tab

steps.title: Find Insights Section
steps.description: Look for 'Business Insights' or 'AI Insights' section on the home screen

steps.title: View Insights
steps.description: Tap on insights to see AI-generated tips and recommendations for your business

steps.title: Read Recommendations
steps.description: Read through insights about sales trends, customer behavior, and business suggestions

tips: Insights are generated based on your business data
Regularly check insights for business improvement tips
Insights help identify opportunities and trends

sections.title: Profile & Settings
sections.description: Manage your shop profile and app settings

items.title: Update Shop Profile
items.description: Update your shop details including name, phone, and UPI information

steps.title: Go to Settings Tab
steps.description: Tap on the Settings/Profile tab in the bottom navigation

steps.title: Find Profile Section
steps.description: Look for 'Profile' or 'Shop Details' section at the top

steps.title: Edit Shop Name
steps.description: Tap on shop name field to update your business name

steps.title: Update Phone Number
steps.description: Edit your phone number if it has changed

steps.title: Update UPI ID
steps.description: Enter or update your UPI ID for receiving payments

steps.title: Add Shop Image (Optional)
steps.description: Upload a profile picture or logo for your shop

steps.title: Save Changes
steps.description: Tap 'Save' button to update your profile information

tips: Keep your profile updated for customer reference
UPI ID helps customers pay you easily
Shop image makes your profile more professional

items.title: Manage App Settings
items.description: Configure app preferences and notifications

steps.title: Go to Settings Tab
steps.description: Navigate to the Settings tab from bottom navigation

steps.title: View Settings Options
steps.description: Browse through available settings like notifications, theme, language, etc.

steps.title: Configure Notifications
steps.description: Enable or disable notifications for reminders, payments, and updates

steps.title: Change Theme
steps.description: Switch between light and dark mode if available

steps.title: Manage Data
steps.description: Clear cache, export data, or manage offline storage

steps.title: Save Settings
steps.description: Settings are usually saved automatically when changed

tips: Enable notifications to never miss important reminders
Settings help customize app to your preferences
Regular data management keeps app running smoothly

items.title: Add Offline Payments
items.description: Record customer payments when you have no internet

steps.title: Open Offline Operations
steps.description: When there's no internet, the app automatically shows the Offline Operations screen

steps.title: Go to Payments Tab
steps.description: Tap on the Payments tab to add a new payment

steps.title: Enter Details
steps.description: Fill in customer name, village, and amount

steps.title: Save Payment
steps.description: Tap Add Payment. All data is saved locally on your phone

tips: You can add multiple payments offline
All data will be available when you view offline data later

items.title: Add Offline Sales
items.description: Create sales entries without internet connection

steps.title: Go to Sales Tab
steps.description: In Offline Operations screen, tap on the Sales tab

steps.title: Enter Sale Details
steps.description: Fill in customer name, phone, product name, and price

steps.title: Save Sale
steps.description: Tap Add Sale. The sale is saved locally on your device

tips: Phone number is optional but recommended
You can view all offline sales later from the home screen

items.title: Take Notes
items.description: Write important notes and reminders

steps.title: Go to Notes Tab
steps.description: In Offline Operations screen, tap on the Notes tab

steps.title: Write Your Notes
steps.description: Type your notes in the text area. Notes are saved automatically

steps.title: Clear Notes
steps.description: Use the clear button to delete all notes if needed

tips: Notes are saved automatically as you type
Use notes for reminders, ideas, or important information

items.title: View Offline Data
items.description: View and manage all your offline payments, sales, and notes

steps.title: Open Home Screen
steps.description: Go to the Home tab in the bottom navigation

steps.title: Find Business Tools
steps.description: Scroll down to the Business Tools section

steps.title: Tap Offline Icon
steps.description: Tap on the Offline icon to view all your offline data

steps.title: View Data
steps.description: Switch between Payments, Sales, and Notes tabs to view your data

steps.title: Delete Items
steps.description: Tap the delete icon on any item to remove it permanently

tips: All offline data is stored locally on your device
You can delete individual items or clear all notes
Data persists even after closing the app

items.title: Interest Calculator
items.description: Calculate interest on loans or investments

steps.title: Open Interest Calculator
steps.description: Go to Home screen, scroll to Utilities section, and tap on Interest icon

steps.title: Enter Principal Amount
steps.description: Enter the principal amount (the initial loan or investment amount)

steps.title: Enter Interest Rate
steps.description: Enter the interest rate. Select if it's yearly or monthly rate

steps.title: Enter Time Period
steps.description: Enter the time period. You can use days, months, or years. Or select dates

steps.title: Calculate
steps.description: Tap Calculate button to see the interest and total amount

tips: You can calculate interest for loans given to customers
Supports both yearly and monthly interest rates
You can use date range or time period for calculation

items.title: Learn from us
items.description: Watch how-to videos and product updates

steps.title: YouTube: Marava Technologies
steps.description: https://www.youtube.com/@MaravaTechnologies

steps.title: Instagram: @maravatechnologies
steps.description: https://www.instagram.com/maravatechnologies/

tips: YouTube has "How to use Abhedyam" and feature walkthroughs
Instagram shares new product updates and short tips
